meaning: adj.多岩石的,坚如岩石的,坚固的,摇摇晃晃的,头晕目眩的,困难的
examples: The ship lay at anchor two miles off the rocky coast.
The land dropped precipitously down to the rocky shore.
He began a career in journalism, working for the Rocky Mountain News.
What helps is the vast network of producers, fishermen and farmers the Rocky Mountaineer relies on.
The Pacific Coast Highway stretches out ahead, tracing rocky headlands and gentle sandy bays.
